question: How much would you like me to interact with you?

options.label: Default
options.description: Interview me for any major concerns and blocking issues.

options.label: Auto
options.description: No, try your best to auto solve the problem.

options.label: Focused
options.description: Ask detailed follow-up questions about edge cases, alternatives, and tradeoffs.

question: How should I fix review issues?

options.label: Suggestion
options.description: Fix all issues including optional suggestions.

question: Should I check and refine the specs with you first?

options.label: No
options.description: No, the specs are fine as they are.

options.label: Yes
options.description: Review the specs with me and refine them until they're solid before implementation.

question: Should I do a deep research based on the specs before implementation?

options.label: Yes
options.description: Conduct deep research based on the specs before implementation.

options.label: No
options.description: No, the specs already cover every nook and cranny.
